title: Commenting features in Workdocs
excerpt: I’m looking to see if there is an update coming to improve the comment features in workdocs. Our team has uses these as a collaborative tool, but have had some issues when it comes to comments/edits within a doc. Is ther…

posts.author: Hannah_Albert (Hannah Albert)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking to see if there is an update coming to improve the comment features in workdocs. Our team has uses these as a collaborative tool, but have had some issues when it comes to comments/edits within a doc. Is there the ability to have other user resolve comments they did not make? Can highlighted items be edited by other users rather than the original commenter? These features would be very helpful when it comes to how we collaborate on work.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: We would also like an easier way to navigate from comment to comment rather than having to search for the next highlighted comment.
